key.name: start-on-disks
key.description: Show the disk panel when Nautilus opens

key.name: show-system-partitions
key.description: Show boot and EFI partitions in the System group

key.name: visibility-system
key.description: How the System group is displayed: visible, merged into On this computer, or hidden

key.name: visibility-removable
key.description: How the Removable Devices group is displayed: visible, merged, or hidden

key.name: visibility-disc
key.description: How the Disc Images group is displayed: visible, merged, or hidden

key.name: visibility-network
key.description: How the Network Volumes group is displayed: visible, merged, or hidden

key.name: sidebar-show-home
key.summary: Show Home in the sidebar Computer group
key.description: Show the Home place in the custom Computer group on the sidebar

key.name: sidebar-show-recent
key.summary: Show Recent in the sidebar Computer group
key.description: Show the Recent place in the custom Computer group on the sidebar

key.name: sidebar-show-starred
key.summary: Show Starred in the sidebar Computer group
key.description: Show the Starred place in the custom Computer group on the sidebar

key.name: sidebar-show-network
key.summary: Show Network in the sidebar Computer group
key.description: Show the Network place in the custom Computer group on the sidebar

key.name: sidebar-show-trash
key.summary: Show Trash in the sidebar Computer group
key.description: Show the Trash place in the custom Computer group on the sidebar

key.name: custom-color
key.description: Hex color used when color-mode is flat

key.name: custom-gradient-color-1
key.description: Left color (stop 20%) used when color-mode is gradient

key.name: custom-gradient-color-2
key.description: Right color (stop 100%) used when color-mode is gradient
